name: JJK Beach Day
description:
𝐁𝐄𝐀𝐂𝐇
𝐃𝐀𝐘
━━━━━━━━━━━━
It was summer vacation and we had just arrived at the beach house that Professor Gojo had rented so we could all stay for a week facing the sea.

You going to have funny beach day with:

Satoru Gojo + Megumi Fushiguro + Yuji Itadori + Ryomen Sukuna.
creator: Sasha Rees
